name: Paul William Auston, A.B.
description: Paul's interest is divided between a pre-med. course and Florida State College for Women. Despite the fact that he spends most of his time in the chemistry lab., we see enough of him to know he's a good sport.

name: Hobart Palmer Amos, A.B.
enrolltime: joined our class in '22, after having begun his career in the Class of '24
description: We are proud of him, and he stands out as one of Howard's best and most popular young ministers.

name: Mildred Atkinson, A.B.
enrolltime: didn't enter Howard with the Class of '25
description: Although Mildred didn't enter Howard with the Class of '25, we feel very fortunate to be able to claim her. She is a quiet sort of girl, and in her short time here she has made many friends, and great things are expected of her.

name: Thelma Ada Bates, A.B.
description: What would we have done if one couldn't have graduated in three years? Thelma joined our class last year and is one of our best leaders. She is an excellent student and a capable girl with a charming personality. We are proud to have honored her so, and Howard will feel a loss in her graduation.

name: E. LURTON BLASSINGAME
description: Auburn's loss was Howard's gain. "Count" entered in his junior year, and immediately demonstrated his ability to be a brilliant student. Few men in the many years gone by have so impressed the students and faculty with their ability. Aside from his classes, he has found time to take leading roles in the "Little Theater."

name: ROY L. BONNER
description: Bonner was married before entering Howard, and due to domestic responsibilities, he was in a way kept out of college life. He was a ready contributor to everything that was for the betterment of the school, and we wish him luck in his future career.

name: WILLIAM ROSS BRITTON
description: Everybody likes Billie, and Billie likes everybody. He is a good-natured person, who takes life none too seriously, and makes friends while he's doing it.

name: THELMA BULLINGTON
description: Thelma is quite an attractive girl. She attends strictly to her own business and appears always busy. We are glad that she has joined our class.

name: DANIEL WEBSTER BURSON
description: With a name like this, who couldn't amount to something? 'Dan,' as he is called, is one of Howard's outstanding figures. He was faithful and sincere in all his duties, and it was through his efforts that many great things were accomplished by the Howard student body. Who doesn't know the man that either makes or seconds all the motions?

name: MARY ALICE BUSBY
description: Mary Alice is so quiet we sometimes wonder how she can make so many friends. Is it her sunny disposition and gentility of culture?

name: FRED CARTER
clubs: Honor Man Freshman Class at Auburn
description: Fred has a heart big enough for one twice his size, and capability is his middle name. A good disposition, gobs of knowledge, and tons of personality.

name: ERNEST BRAXTON COSPER
description: Cosper is quiet on the surface, but still water runs deep. He's a serious-minded person, and one of the blessed few who tends to his own business. We all like him. He's a prince of a fellow, one that stands well in his classes, with the students, and is good-looking enough to be termed a 'sheik' by the fair sex.

name: ETHEL MAE CURETON
description: Ethel is a girl that, if you know, you are bound to love. She has a charming personality and is dependable. She makes a wonderful president of the Woman's Student Government.

name: J. IVEY EDWARDS
description: Edwards has outshone the whole class in scholarship. He has been marshal every year, and besides that, he has captured many medals. "Ed" left us this year to teach, but we are proud that he is getting his "dip" with us.

name: MARGARET ELIZABETH FOSTER
description: Elizabeth is just "bound to succeed," for she is a brilliant student and a friend maker. She's taken a prominent part in all student activities, and is one of the most dependable co-eds. Her honors speak for themselves.

name: WILLIAM SHEPARD FULLER
description: Fuller is a quiet fellow who has spent quite a bit of his time in the science building. He is quite fond of the feminine sex, and has spent much of his time in making the band go.

name: INEZ GARDNER
description: Inez is a faithful student. She takes quite an interest in religious affairs, and though very quiet, her work for Howard is bounded by a great circumference.

name: EDITH GEISLER
description: Edith's career at Howard has been quite short. She has worked hard, made good grades, and we feel sure that she will make good. We wonder what she will select for a future.

name: JACKSON LEE GREGORY
motto: "to know him is to love him."
description: Jack is an easy-going sort of person that proves "to know him is to love him." He's an excellent student, true friend, and regular all-round boy.

name: MABEL GLORIA HARRIS
description: Mabel has golden hair, and you can guess the rest. She is quite smart, and has a large circle of friends. She took an active part in student activities.

name: HEARNE, EVELYN NELL
description: Evelyn has made the honor roll every time. She has worked hard and has many friends. Success is bound to come to her, whatever her future may be.

name: HOLBROOK, JAMES STIVENDER
description: "Snipe," as he is called, is one of our most popular members of the class. He is a hard worker, and is always interested in doing something for Howard.

name: HOOVER, DAISY
clubs: Undergraduate Representative Y. W. C. A. (3, 4)
description: As her honors show, Daisy is one of Howard's most popular co-eds. She is quite a leader, and when she graduates she will be missed in all the organizations of which she is an outstanding member.

name: HUGENSMITH, EDWARD JOSEPH
description: "Lank" joined us last year, but he did it actively. He is very popular, and does quite a bit for the school. His literary capabilities are very great, and he stands out as one of our most exemplary students.

name: LELAND GLADWYN JOHNSON
description: Leland is the hardest working member of the Senior class. He is very studious, and is always seen with a book. He is well-liked, and we expect to hear from him in the future.

name: JULIAN KELLER
description: Whiteman has a rival in Julian. He's a hard worker, a good student, and a clever fellow. His work in helping to organize the band has been greatly appreciated by all.

name: ANNA KENDA
description: Anna is a steady, consistent girl. She is a hard worker, but always has time to smile and speak. If work will help, Anna will surely amount to something in the literary world.

name: GLADYS WHITLOCK KING
description: Gladys journeyed many miles to attend Howard. She has worked hard, and her reward is bound to come. She is an enjoyable worker, and her co-operative spirit is shown in well-nigh every undertaking.

name: Ruby Little
description: Few girls can boast of the record "Poco" has made in the pre-med. course. She has done excellent work here, and is a girl with high morals and has a large circle of friends.

name: William Tellis Mims
description: Mims joined our class this year. He can truthfully say that he has spent more time in the library than anyone in school. He is a great and admirable fellow.

name: Susie Minter
description: Susie is another literary light. She is awfully smart, and is quite well read. She works hard, and her grades show her ability.

name: Lola Mae Moody
description: To be able to make Honor Roll, help run the Y. W. C. A., and draw wonderfully, is not the least of Lola Mae's honors. She's a quiet girl, but one that always has a cheerful greeting for everybody.

name: McBride, Margaret Louise
description: Margaret has spent four years at Howard. She seems to have enjoyed herself quite well, because she handed a pleasant smile to all. She works hard and brings up her work well.

name: McCullar, Eoline
motto: "A thing of beauty is a joy forever."
description: Eoline will be a joy for someone, for she is beautiful. Her beauty and charm have meant a great deal to her, and yet she has taken much interest in college. She violates the rule, "Beautiful but dumb."

name: Nunnelley, Richard A., Jr.
description: When a boy is liked by both teachers and students, can manage a football team, go to Auburn and come back and still hold his place with us, then he must be one hundred per cent—Dick is!

name: Parsons, Irma
description: Irma has spent much of her time in lab. work. She made good grades, and is known for her grace and neatness. Cupid has seemed to meddle with her quite a bit, and even if he does, we wish her a happy and profitable career.

name: Ray, Ivie Pearl
description: Ivie Pearl is another artist of our class. Her musical talent is wonderful, and regardless of the opposite sex, she is independent. She has made good grades, and is very popular, as her honors show.

name: Reeves, Bernice White
description: If you want a good laugh, look for Bernice. She is very witty and pleasant. She is a shark in French and Spanish. Her dramatic ability is remarkable, and we see success awaiting her.

name: Riddle, Jason Gordon
description: Another pre-med. He has spent his college career in Smith Hall, and we predict quite a future for him in medicine. Although very quiet and a bit hard to know, you can't help but like him.

name: Saxon, George R.
description: As president of the student body, George has made a wonderful success. He is winner of the Birmingham News Scholarship, and he justly deserved it, for he is one of the few students who can get A's, co-operation from the faculty and the student body, and school spirit at the same time. We are proud of him.

name: John Thomas Sheppard, A.B.
description: "Shep" is a hard worker. He scrubbed football for three years, and in his last year starred on the varsity. He is a real plugger and is sure to amount to something. He is studying medicine, also.

name: Kathleen Sloan, A.B.
description: Without Naufleet, Kathleen is lost, but time caused her to graduate before Naufleet. She is a very likable person, and her appearance will be missed. A husband and a home will be a suitable reward.

name: Alonzo Clifton Stephenson, A.B.
description: We're sorry to see "Cliff" leave. He's an enthusiastic supporter of athletics and the kind of fellow who'd hobo to see a football game. He's serious, yet has enough fun in his make-up to make him one of the most popular members of the Class of '25.

name: James Jones Stewart, A.B.
description: Being a pre-med, "Stutz" knows about all the science there is. Not the least of his honors is manager of the band, and the student body, and the faculty realize that the fine display November 22 was due largely to him. He possesses that which so many lack—ambition. He has held the position of biology laboratory instructor for the past year. That in itself is evidence of his brain and ability.

name: Perry L. Stone
description: Perry is another with an opinion and one who speaks as he believes. His vocabulary is unbounded, and he will make a place in the world, we feel sure. He was quite active in religious affairs while in college.

name: William Howard Stubbs
description: Here's to "Toby," our all-round athlete and the best of sports! We will never forget the stellar work this Bulldog warrior has done for the past four seasons. Toby will be greatly missed next year from the student body as well as the athletic field. He's a friend true as steel. He is the kind of fellow who can play football, baseball, and coach and play basketball.

name: Henry E. Thompson
description: "Gus," as he is called, our vice-president, has been an active member of our class for four years. He is a well-liked fellow and stands out as a leader on the campus. He is a good student, and in the near future he is bound to be heard from.

name: Mayme Thompson
description: Mayme is the quietest girl in the class. She has charm and dramatic ability, and her friends are numbered by her acquaintances. She has spent many useful hours for Howard.

name: GERTRUDE B. TIDWELL
description: Gertrude has a head full of brains. She comes out on top in every class. She teaches art and goes to school. Howard will never turn out a more efficient graduate than she is.

name: T. RAY TURNER
description: "Chi" joined us this year, but has jumped right in with a great spirit. Commerce has taken most of his time, but he is always ready to go in anyway when the gong is sounded.

name: H. E. WATLINGTON, JR.
description: "Personality" is a much abused word, but Gene is the embodiment of personality. He is a leader who makes not the slightest effort to be one. We know there isn't a member of the Class of '25 that the school hates to part with more than Gene. He's a good sport, if ever there was one, and an optimistic supporter of Howard.

name: ARTHUR SPESSARD WATTERS
clubs: President College B. Y. P. U. (3)
description: "Preacher" Watters, as we call him, is one of the most popular ministerial students on the campus. His amiability and spirit of helpfulness have made him many friends.

name: Violette Arcella Wilhite
description: Violette has advanced rapidly during her stay at Howard. She has worked hard and made good grades. She has taken an active part in religious affairs. We wish you well, Violette.

name: Katherine Lowman Wilking
description: Katherine knew a good school when she saw it. She started her college career at Birmingham-Southern, but soon saw her mistake. She is an artist and has made good in every respect. We are proud to boast that she belongs to the Class of '25.

name: Mabel E. Willoughby
clubs: Voted Cleverest Girl in Junior Class
Delegate to Y. W. C. A. Conference (3)
description: Mabel has been identified in nearly every activity on the campus. This year her work with Y. W. C. A. has been far-reaching. Friendliness and charm together make Mabel a girl worth knowing.

name: James Henry Wise
description: A second glance at his honors ought to give you an idea of what four years at Howard has meant to "Puny" and Puny has meant to Howard. He has taken a leading part in every activity with which he has been associated. Howard needs more of his kind, and he'll be sorely missed next year, for there can never be another Puny. There's not a better liked boy on the campus.

name: VESTER LAFAYETTE WYATT, A.B.
description: Be there any so ignorant that he doesn't know "Preacher" Wyatt? Preacher has spent much time in doing pastorate work, but is always on hand when he is needed. He enjoys parliamentary work, and is a sage in parliamentary law. He is always for Howard and the right.

name: GLADYS IRA WYATT, A.B.
description: You'd never know Gladys was around. She is very quiet, but always wears a pleasant smile. She has studied hard and also taken an important role in the religious work of the campus.

name: THELMA STACY YARBROUGH, A.B.
clubs: Charter Member Woman's Athletic Association of Alabama (4)
description: Thelma has certainly carried off the honors while here, and last year she carried off a husband, too. We are glad she didn't forsake us for matrimony, and will graduate with the Class of '25. Her work with the co-ed basketball team has been excellent, and her school spirit has been undying.

name: OLLIE GERTRUDE YOUNG, A.B.
clubs: Head English Department Barbour County High School '22-'23
Head English Department Jackson County High '23, '24
description: Ollie joined our class this year. She has been in school off and on, but she is a devout worker and is truly conscientious. She looks for the right and will do well in the educational world.

name: NELL McELHENNEY
description: Nell has carried off the beauty distinction for two years, an honor not to be despised. However, hers isn't just skin-deep. She entered in her sophomore year from Brenau and has proven an asset to the Class of '25. She is attractive and charming, loved alike by boys and girls. Nell is a loyal supporter of athletics, and she sponsored the Bulldog eleven to a victory over Millsaps.

name: REGINALD LESLIE EVANS
enrolltime: joined us last year, coming from Mississippi
description: Evans joined us last year, coming from Mississippi. He is a Divinity student, and is a hard worker.

name: LILLIE HOLLIMAN
description: Lillie honored us by graduating with us. Most of her college career was spent at Montevallo, but she came to Howard for her degree. We are glad of her decision and welcome her to the Class of '25.

name: Dawson, Eugene
description: Voted Most Popular Boy in Sophomore Class.

name: De Loach, Arthur
description: Newton College (1, 2).

name: Estes, Clyde Henry
description: A.A., Cumberland College (2).

name: WILLIE MAE HARDY
clubs: Delegate S. V. Conference at Indianapolis (2)

name: MARY FRANCES McNEIL
clubs: Assistant Treasurer Y. W. C. A. (2)

name: DOROTHY EVELYN CLARK
clubs: Best All-Round Girl in Freshman Class

name: JAMES WEBER FOSTER, Π K A
RAUHL H. GRAVLEE, Σ Δ X
McCORMACK, WILLIE KATHLEEN
description: Winner Mathematics Medal (1).

name: PERRYMAN, MARGARET
description: Prettiest Girl in Freshman Class.

name: VERA SCOTT
clubs: Prize in Music for Piano Study

name: ROY L. SHELTON
clubs: President J. O. Y. B. Y. P. U.

name: MARTHA VIRGINIA WALL
clubs: Delegate to Y. W. C. A. Conference at M. S. C. W.
